title: Chat-to-build authoring (discuss-automation skill, reuses Kanban Discuss handoff)

implement.detail: lib/discuss.mjs (slugify + buildAutomationKickoff james-mode + buildAutomationDiscussUrl base64 context+kickoff, reusing the verified Kanban Discuss->web-channel handoff); GET /api/automations/discuss-url; run-viewer '+ Discuss an automation' button -> window.open the web-channel; discuss-automation skill fitting (apm.yml type:skill, SKILL.md, install-skill.sh + verify.sh resolving COMPOSITION_DIR from $0).

test.detail: automations-discuss (3: slugify, james-mode kickoff -> brief path, discuss URL decodes to source=automations + james mode). validate 4/4. Functional path-resolution test: setup+verify both land the skill at <composition>/.claude/skills/discuss-automation/SKILL.md. typecheck clean.

codexReview.detail: R1 (high): install/verify used a cwd-relative .claude/skills (self-consistent but wrong target) -> rewrote both to resolve COMPOSITION_DIR from $0 and target <composition>/.claude/skills absolutely; functionally proven in a simulated apm_modules/_local layout. Agreed + fixed.

codexPwTest.detail: Z1 authors the example automation via Discuss
